message:
Add 22 comprehensive logging behavior tests

Tests cover:
- File creation: parent directories, append mode, size tracking
- Log entry formats: plain text and JSON mode
- Console output: TTY detection, color codes for each level
- Log level filtering: console level, file level, combined
- Rotation: file count limits, oldest file deletion, size reset
- Structured events: startup, shutdown, error conditions
- Integration: complete logging workflow simulation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
